title: Herb-Crusted Mediterranean Fish Fry
description: A flavorful and healthy Mediterranean-inspired dish featuring fresh herbs, crispy crust, and pan-seared fish.

ingredients.name: Herbal olive oil
ingredients.notes: use a mix of herbs like oregano, thyme, and rosemary

instructions: 2. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
3. In a small bowl, mix together herbal olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, Mediterranean seasoning, salt, and pepper.
4. Dip each cod fillet in the herbal mixture, coating both sides evenly.
5. Dredge the coated cod fillets in flour, shaking off excess.
6. Place the coated cod fillets on the prepared baking sheet.
7. Bake in the preheated oven for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
8. While the fish is baking, heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
9. Add a small amount of herbal olive oil to the skillet and swirl to coat.
10. Remove the baked fish from the oven and carefully place it in the skillet.
11. Pan-fry the fish for 2-3 minutes on each side or until crispy and golden brown.
